2604.10908.title: Reasoning as Data: Representation-Computation Unity and Its Implementation in a Domain-Algebraic Inference Engine
2604.10908.paper_summary: Every existing knowledge system separates storage from computation. We show this separation is unnecessary and eliminate it. In a standard triple is_a(Apple, Company), domain context lives in the query or the programmer's mind. In a CDC four-tuple is_a(Apple, Company, @Business), domain becomes a structural field embedded in predicate arity. Any system respecting arity automatically performs domain-scoped inference without external rules. We call this representation-computation unity (RCU). From the four-tuple structure, three inference mechanisms emerge: domain-scoped closure, typed inheritance, and write-time falsification via cycle detection per domain fiber. We establish RCU formally via four theorems. RCU is implementable. We present a working symbolic engine (2400 lines Python+Prolog) resolving four engineering issues: rule-data separation, shared-fiber handling, read-only meta-layer design, and intersective convergence. A central result: CDC domain-constrained inference is distinct from Prolog with a domain argument. Two case studies validate the engine. ICD-11 classification (1247 entities, 3 axes) shows fibers resolve multiple inheritance. CBT clinical reasoning shows generalization to temporal reasoning with session turn as ordered domain index. Multi-constraint queries realize CSP arc-consistency with complexity O(m (N/K)^2), confirming the domain lattice's sparsity governs performance. When domain is structural, data computes itself.
2604.10908.paper_summary_zh: 每個現有的知識系統都將存儲與計算分開。我們展示了這種分離是多餘的，並將其消除。在標準三元組 is_a(Apple, Company) 中，領域上下文存在於查詢或程序員的心中。在 CDC 四元組 is_a(Apple, Company, @Business) 中，領域成為嵌入在謂詞元數中的結構字段。任何尊重元數的系統都會自動執行領域範圍的推理，而無需外部規則。我們稱這種表示-計算統一性為 RCU。從四元組結構中，出現了三種推理機制：領域範圍的閉包、類型繼承，以及通過每個領域纖維的循環檢測進行的寫時虛假化。我們通過四個定理正式建立 RCU。RCU 是可實現的。我們展示了一個工作中的符號引擎（2400 行 Python+Prolog），解決了四個工程問題：規則-數據分離、共享纖維處理、只讀元層設計以及交集收斂。一個核心結果：CDC 領域約束推理與帶有領域參數的 Prolog 是不同的。兩個案例研究驗證了該引擎。ICD-11 分類（1247 個實體，3 個軸）顯示纖維解決了多重繼承。CBT 臨床推理顯示了對時間推理的概括，會話回合作為有序的領域索引。多約束查詢實現了 CSP 弧一致性，複雜度為 O(m (N/K)^2)，確認了領域格的稀疏性主導性能。當領域是結構性的時候，數據自我計算。
2604.10908.author: Chao Li et.al.
